codeReview.summary: The implementation is minimal and correct. App.svelte was updated in a single commit (12 insertions, 1 deletion) that: (1) removes WalletButton from .header-actions, (2) adds a new .wallet-row div between </header> and <ChainMismatchWarning>, and (3) styles .wallet-row with display:flex, justify-content:center, width:100%, max-width:800px, and margin:0 auto 1rem. All four expected behaviors from the feature spec are satisfied. The openWalletMenu callback is preserved unchanged, so wallet connect/disconnect modal behavior remains intact. The browser screenshot confirms the wallet button appears in its own centered row below the header and above the form.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker modified .factory/skills/svelte-worker/SKILL.md during the session (visible in git status mid-transcript) but did not commit those changes — the feature commit only included packages/frontend/src/App.svelte. The skill update was silently abandoned. The worker's skillFeedback.followedProcedure=false notes two deviations (using npm run typecheck instead of npx tsc --noEmit, and using built-in Playwright instead of the agent-browser skill). The skill's procedure describes these steps in a slightly divergent way from how the project actually works, so the worker's edits to SKILL.md may have been intended to align the skill with reality. Those improvements are now lost.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mid-transcript git status showed: ' M .factory/skills/svelte-worker/SKILL.md M packages/frontend/src/App.svelte'. The final commit (9daeeb2) only contains packages/frontend/src/App.svelte per git show --stat. Worker skillFeedback lists two procedural deviations both of which suggest the skill text doesn't match project conventions.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The TDD exception in the skill ('Exception for CSS-only tasks: skip TDD') covers pure CSS changes but this feature was a structural layout change (moving a component in the template). No new tests were added for the relocated WalletButton's placement in App.svelte. The existing App.test.ts is a near-empty placeholder (Read showed it as only 297 chars). For layout/placement changes there is currently no guidance on whether tests are expected or not.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows worker read packages/frontend/src/__tests__/App.test.ts (tool result 297 chars, indicating a very small test file) and then proceeded without adding any new tests. Handoff tests.added is empty. Skill says CSS-only exception, but this is a template structure change.

summary: PASS. The implementation precisely matches all four expectedBehavior items: WalletButton is removed from .header-actions, a new .wallet-row div is inserted between the header and the rest of the page, it is centered with max-width:800px matching the form, and the wallet connect/disconnect modal behavior is untouched. Typecheck, lint, and all 621 tests (API + frontend) passed. Browser screenshot confirms correct placement. Two non-blocking shared-state observations: (1) the worker's in-session edits to svelte-worker/SKILL.md were never committed, losing potential procedure improvements; (2) there is no guidance on whether structural layout moves in App.svelte warrant component placement tests.
